simple_types.name: LINMR_NACT_Field
simple_types.code:
type LINMR_NACT_Field is
   PUBLISH,
   SUBSCRIBE,
   IGNORE)
  with Size => 2;

enumeration_literals.name: SUBSCRIBE
enumeration_literals.description: The USART does not transmit and does not receive the response.

simple_types.name: MAN_RX_PP_Field
simple_types.code:
type MAN_RX_PP_Field is
   ALL_ONE,
   ALL_ZERO,
   ZERO_ONE,
   ONE_ZERO)
  with Size => 2;

simple_types.name: MAN_TX_PP_Field
simple_types.code:
type MAN_TX_PP_Field is
   ALL_ONE,
   ALL_ZERO,
   ZERO_ONE,
   ONE_ZERO)
  with Size => 2;

simple_types.name: MR_CHMODE_Field
simple_types.code:
type MR_CHMODE_Field is
   NORMAL,
   AUTOMATIC,
   LOCAL_LOOPBACK,
   REMOTE_LOOPBACK)
  with Size => 2;

enumeration_literals.name: NORMAL
enumeration_literals.description: Automatic Echo. Receiver input is connected to the TXD pin.

enumeration_literals.name: AUTOMATIC
enumeration_literals.description: Local Loopback. Transmitter output is connected to the Receiver Input.

enumeration_literals.name: LOCAL_LOOPBACK
enumeration_literals.description: Remote Loopback. RXD pin is internally connected to the TXD pin.

simple_types.name: MR_CHRL_Field
simple_types.code:
type MR_CHRL_Field is
   Val_5_BIT,
   Val_6_BIT,
   Val_7_BIT,
   Val_8_BIT)
  with Size => 2;

simple_types.name: MR_NBSTOP_Field
simple_types.code:
type MR_NBSTOP_Field is
   Val_1_BIT,
   Val_1_5_BIT,
   Val_2_BIT)
  with Size => 2;

simple_types.name: MR_PAR_Field
simple_types.code:
type MR_PAR_Field is
   EVEN,
   ODD,
   SPACE,
   MARK,
   NO,
   MULTIDROP)
  with Size => 3;

simple_types.name: MR_SPI_MODE_CHRL_Field
simple_types.code:
type MR_SPI_MODE_CHRL_Field is
   MR_SPI_MODE_CHRL_Field_Reset,
   Val_8_BIT)
  with Size => 2;

simple_types.name: MR_SPI_MODE_USART_MODE_Field
simple_types.code:
type MR_SPI_MODE_USART_MODE_Field is
   MR_SPI_MODE_USART_MODE_Field_Reset,
   SPI_MASTER,
   SPI_SLAVE)
  with Size => 4;

simple_types.name: MR_SPI_MODE_USCLKS_Field
simple_types.code:
type MR_SPI_MODE_USCLKS_Field is
   MCK,
   DIV,
   SCK)
  with Size => 2;

enumeration_literals.name: MCK
enumeration_literals.description: Internal Clock Divided MCK/DIV (DIV=8) is selected

simple_types.name: MR_USART_MODE_Field
simple_types.code:
type MR_USART_MODE_Field is
   NORMAL,
   RS485,
   HW_HANDSHAKING,
   IS07816_T_0,
   IS07816_T_1,
   IRDA,
   LIN_MASTER,
   LIN_SLAVE,
   SPI_MASTER,
   SPI_SLAVE)
  with Size => 4;

simple_types.name: MR_USCLKS_Field
simple_types.code:
type MR_USCLKS_Field is
   MCK,
   DIV,
   SCK)
  with Size => 2;

enumeration_literals.name: MCK
enumeration_literals.description: Internal Clock Divided MCK/DIV (DIV=8) is selected

simple_types.name: WPMR_WPKEY_Field
simple_types.code:
type WPMR_WPKEY_Field is
   WPMR_WPKEY_Field_Reset,
   PASSWD)
  with Size => 24;

enumeration_literals.name: WPMR_WPKEY_Field_Reset
enumeration_literals.description:
Writing any other value in this field aborts the write operation of the
WPEN bit. Always reads as 0.
